pi_items.source: Found in install_autopsy.sh which downloads DFTT #7 to this path.
Found in setup_task.sh which generates this file dynamically by running TSK tools over the image.
Found in export_result.sh which parses this output file path to package the final evaluation report.
Found in export_result.sh which creates the final result artifact at this path.
Found in setup_task.sh which writes the ground truth dictionary to this path for verifier.py.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on the real DFTT #7 NTFS Undelete forensic test disk image. Ground truth for the reverse mapping exercise is generated dynamically at runtime by the 'setup_task.sh' script using The Sleuth Kit (TSK) terminal commands against the image, ensuring all paths and expected metadata properties accurately match the environment.
